series_metadata.series_description: Reports of monitors of school districts falling under Sections 3313.4810 and 3313.488 of the Ohio Revised Code.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain ten years, contact State Archives for review and possible transfer or disposal.. ; Paper: When paper is converted to machine readable format, check for accuracy and completeness prior to discarding the paper, Electronic: Archives ; Paper: Shred
